name: yomira
description: Yomira reaction simulation API and Mora option-mapping skill for AI agents.

scripts.check: node --check bin/mora.mjs && node --check bin/reaction-sim.mjs && node --check src/simulation/engine.mjs && node --check src/simulation/server.mjs && node --check src/billing/plans.mjs && node --check src/billing/kv.mjs && node --check src/billing/ledger.mjs && node --check src/billing/stripe.mjs && node --check src/billing/auth.mjs && node --check src/billing/auto-topup.mjs && node --check src/http/cors.mjs && node --check api/health.mjs && node --check api/simulate.mjs && node --check api/simulations/index.mjs && node --check api/simulations/[id].mjs && node --check api/auth/register.mjs && node --check api/auth/login.mjs && node --check api/billing/checkout.mjs && node --check api/billing/claim.mjs && node --check api/billing/me.mjs && node --check api/billing/auto-topup.mjs && node --check api/billing/webhook.mjs
